name: Jordan
plugDescriptions: Type B — Two flat parallel pins + grounding pin (North American style)
Type C — Two round pins (Europlug, most common worldwide)
Type D — Three large round pins in triangle (India/South Asia)
Type F — Two round pins + grounding clips (Schuko, German style)
Type G — Three rectangular pins (British style)
Type J — Three round pins (Swiss style)
adapterNotes: Wide variety of plug types. Universal adapter essential.
